source: User-pasted La Hacienda Mexican Restaurant online ordering menu, stated by user to apply to all La Hacienda locations in this project.

sections: Sopes - corn-flour cakes, lightly fried, topped with beans, lettuce, mild green tomatillo sauce, queso fresco, avocado slice, sour cream
Taqueria - order of three tacos with rice and refried or black beans
Enchiladas - add cheese sauce for additional charge
Quesadillas - add cheese sauce for additional charge
Chicken - add cheese sauce for additional charge
Fajitas - cooked with onions, green and red bell peppers; served with rice, beans, lettuce, guacamole, tomatoes, sour cream
Seafood - add cheese sauce for additional charge
Chimichangas - add cheese sauce for additional charge
House Specials - add cheese sauce for additional price
Chiles Rellenos - add cheese sauce for additional price
Make Your Own Combo - includes rice and beans
Vegetarian - add cheese sauce for additional price
desserts: Churros with Ice Cream ($6.75) - fried twisted dough with sugar, cinnamon, and honey
NY Cheesecake ($5.95) - served with strawberry topping
Ultimate Chocolate Cake ($7.25) - served over a hot flat iron cast with ice cream and sopapilla
Fried Ice Cream ($5.50) - crispy-coated ice cream topped with whipped cream and a strawberry
Churro cart ($12.00) - fried twisted dough with sugar, cinnamon and honey
disclaimers: *Foods cooked to order, consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk for foodborne illnesses, especially if you have certain medical conditions.
To our guests with food sensitivity or allergies: La Hacienda Mexican restaurants cannot ensure that menu items do not contain ingredients that might cause an allergic reaction.
